nodes.context: A notable Cape Verdean street gang in New England, involved in drug trafficking and other crimes.
A neighborhood-based Cape Verdean street gang in New England, involved in local drug dealing and turf disputes.

A Cape Verdean gang or family in central North Carolina that brokers deals between gangs and has political influence.
An Albanian mafia gang in Martigny, Switzerland, rivaling Cape Verdean gangs over drug trafficking.

edges.context: Cape Verdean street gangs in New England sometimes cooperate but also rival each other, leading to violent clashes.

In Martigny, Switzerland, the Albanian mafia gang and Cape Verdean gangs have traditionally rivaled over drug trafficking, leading to shootings and murders.
